task_completion.description: Open the email client to access the inbox.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An email client application (e.g., Thunderbird, Evolution) is open and displaying the user's inbox.

task_completion.description: Read emails to find colleague names and phone numbers in signatures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent viewing the contents of received emails, specifically looking at email signatures containing names and phone numbers.

task_completion.description: Open a new email composition window.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new email draft/composition window is open in the email client.

task_completion.description: Set the recipient to the emergency contacts address.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'To:' field in the email composition window contains exactly 'emergency-contacts@internal.org'.

task_completion.description: Set the email subject to 'Emergency Phone List'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Subject:' field in the email composition window contains 'Emergency Phone List' (or includes the keywords emergency, phone, contact, list).

task_completion.description: Include at least 3 distinct names and phone numbers in the email body.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body of the email draft contains a list of at least 3 distinct colleague names along with their corresponding phone numbers.

integrity.description: The agent used a graphical email client to compose the draft.
integrity.visual_evidence: The email draft is visible within a genuine email client GUI (like Thunderbird), not created via terminal commands (e.g., mail, mutt) or a plain text editor.

integrity.description: The agent extracted genuine contacts from the inbox rather than hallucinating them.
integrity.visual_evidence: The names and phone numbers in the draft correspond to typical synthetic names found in the inbox (e.g., Sarah Jenkins, Marcus Thorne, Elena Rodriguez) and were not simply copy-pasted from an external script or hallucinated.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the application normally instead of writing directly to Maildir files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using terminal text editors (nano, vim) to manually forge a raw .eml file in the drafts folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The verified target recipient is exactly 'emergency-contacts@internal.org'. The subject must be 'Emergency Phone List' (or contain the keywords 'emergency', 'phone', 'contact', 'list'). The agent must extract at least 3 valid phone numbers and names from the inbox email signatures (expected synthetic contacts include Sarah Jenkins, Marcus Thorne, Elena Rodriguez, David Chen, Fiona O'Malley). The task requires creating an email draft with this information.
